summary: Complete regression testing after refactoring monolithic server.py (~789 lines) into 6 modular route files + deps.py. All 38 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend pages verified working. Zero regressions from the refactor.

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully split monolithic server.py into clean, focused modules
deps.py properly exports shared db, models (User, UserFleet), and auth utilities
All routers correctly import from deps.py and use proper prefix/tags
No functional changes detected - all endpoints work identically to before
JWT authentication properly shared across fleet, loadouts, and ship routes
Public endpoints (gear, routes, community) correctly bypass auth
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing test user geartest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactoring complete and verified. Monolithic server.py successfully split into: auth.py (login/register), ships.py (ships/vehicles/components/weapons), fleet.py (fleet management), loadouts.py (loadouts + community), starmap.py (route planning), gear.py (FPS weapons/armor). deps.py contains shared MongoDB client, User/UserFleet models, JWT auth. All 38 API tests pass. All 5 frontend pages load correctly.

feature_verification_summary.ships_routes: PASS - ships.py returns ships/vehicles/components/weapons with auth
feature_verification_summary.fleet_routes: PASS - fleet.py handles add/my/delete/bulk-add with auth
feature_verification_summary.gear_routes: PASS - gear.py returns 28 FPS weapons and 21 armor sets (public)
feature_verification_summary.frontend_dashboard: PASS - Fleet Command Center with navigation

feature_verification_summary.frontend_gear: PASS - Personal Gear with weapons/armor tabs

feature_verification_summary.frontend_community: PASS - Community Loadouts with search and cards
